text.title: Internal RFC Template Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs a concrete symptom with sourced root-cause and a concrete fix the author can apply.

antipattern.symptom: RFC sits in repo for 8 months; nobody knows if it is live.
antipattern.fix: Validator rejects RFC without `status` + last update <30d.

antipattern.symptom: RFC pushes a single solution; team feels railroaded.
Review window says 'open'; comments trickle in for a year.
